channel.title: Opengl on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Opengl on Arrans github.io

item.title: dotnet/Silk.NET
item.description: The high-speed OpenGL, OpenCL, OpenAL, OpenXR, GLFW, SDL, Vulkan, Assimp, WebGPU, and DirectX bindings library your mother warned you about.

item.title: lettier/3d-game-shaders-for-beginners
item.description: 🎮 A step-by-step guide to implementing SSAO, depth of field, lighting, normal mapping, and more for your 3D game.

item.title: endless-sky/endless-sky
item.description: Space exploration, trading, and combat game.

item.title: liamg/darktile
item.description: 🌘 Darktile is a GPU rendered terminal emulator designed for tiling window managers.

item.title: tdewolff/canvas
item.description: Cairo in Go: vector to raster, SVG, PDF, EPS, WASM, OpenGL, Gio, etc.

item.title: etlegacy/etlegacy
item.description: ET: Legacy is an open source project based on the code of Wolfenstein: Enemy Territory which was released in 2010 under the terms of the GPLv3 license.
